title: Mobile-friendly responsive layout

requirements.text: Make the Navigation component fully responsive: the desktop nav links and CTA buttons should collapse into a hamburger/mobile menu on small screens, ensuring touch targets are large enough and the menu opens/closes smoothly.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation renders a hamburger icon on screens smaller than md breakpoint
Tapping the hamburger opens a full-width dropdown with all nav links
Active section highlighting works in mobile menu
WhatsApp CTA button is accessible in mobile menu

requirements.text: Make the HeroSection responsive: headline text, service badges, action buttons, and the embedded QuickEstimateForm must stack vertically and scale correctly on mobile screens without overflow or truncation.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline font size scales down on mobile (text-3xl or smaller)
Service badges wrap or stack cleanly on small screens
Action buttons are full-width or appropriately sized on mobile
QuickEstimateForm fields are full-width and usable on mobile

requirements.text: Make the ServicesSection and ServiceCard components responsive: the service card grid should switch from multi-column to a single-column or two-column layout on small screens, with readable text and accessible buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: Service cards stack in 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, and 3+ on desktop
Card text does not overflow or get clipped
Quote-request buttons are full-width on mobile

requirements.text: Make the ProductCatalogSection and ProductCard components responsive: the product grid, search input, category filter bar, and InquiryBasket must all be usable on small screens without horizontal scrolling.
acceptanceCriteria: Category filter buttons wrap or scroll horizontally without breaking layout
Search input is full-width on mobile
Product grid is 1 column on mobile and 2 columns on tablet
InquiryBasket panel is readable and scrollable on small screens

requirements.text: Make the GallerySection and ImageLightbox responsive: gallery thumbnails should reflow to fewer columns on mobile, and the lightbox should be full-screen with accessible prev/next controls on touch devices.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery displays 1 column on mobile and 2 columns on tablet
Lightbox fills the full viewport on mobile
Prev/next buttons are large enough for touch (min 44x44px)

requirements.text: Make the PricingSection and PricingCard components responsive: the three-column pricing grid must stack to a single column on mobile with full-width cards.
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing cards stack vertically on mobile
Feature lists and CTA buttons are fully visible without overflow

requirements.text: Make the ContractorZoneSection, ContractorInquiryForm, PremiumQuoteBuilder, SiteVisitBookingForm, and ContactSection responsive: all forms must have full-width inputs on mobile, proper label spacing, and submit buttons that are easy to tap.
acceptanceCriteria: All form inputs are full-width on screens < md
Labels and inputs have sufficient vertical spacing
Submit/CTA buttons are minimum 44px tall
No horizontal overflow on any form section

requirements.text: Make the Footer responsive: footer columns (company info, contact details, quick links, social icons) should stack vertically on mobile and render as a multi-column grid on tablet and desktop.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer columns stack to 1 column on mobile
Social media icons and links are easily tappable (min 44px target)
No text overflow or clipping on small screens

requirements.text: Make the AdminPanel responsive: the tabbed interface, product management table/list, and business settings form must be usable on mobile screens, with inputs and buttons accessible without horizontal scrolling.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin tabs are scrollable or wrap on small screens
Product list switches to card layout on mobile if the table overflows
All form fields in business settings are full-width on mobile

requirements.text: Ensure the FloatingWhatsAppButton does not overlap important content on mobile; reposition or resize it as needed so it does not block bottom navigation or form submit buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating button is positioned so it does not obscure primary CTAs or form submit buttons on small screens
Button is easily tappable on mobile (min 48x48px)

constraints: Do not alter backend logic or data models
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve the existing luxury black-and-gold visual theme and all existing features
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme, color palette, or typography
